title: Spring Open House
description: Tour our facility and meet the team. Light refreshments provided.

title: Quarterly Fundraiser Dinner
location: The Omni Grove Park Inn, Asheville NC
description: Annual black-tie fundraiser supporting our community programs. Seating is limited — reserve early.

title: Summer Workshop Series — Week 1
description: Five-day intensive workshop covering advanced techniques. Includes workbook and certificate of completion.

title: Community Volunteer Day
description: Join us for our annual park cleanup. All supplies provided — bring water and sunscreen.

title: Fall Conference 2026
description: Three-day conference featuring keynote speakers, breakout sessions, and networking. Early-bird pricing ends September 1.

title: New Member Orientation
description: Welcome session for new members. Bring questions — we'll walk through benefits, resources, and how to get involved.

title: Holiday Social
description: Casual evening of food, drinks, and connection. Partners and family welcome.

title: Board Meeting (Members Only)
description: Monthly board meeting. Members may attend; registration required.

title: Guest Speaker: Annual Lecture
description: Special evening lecture from our annual guest speaker, followed by Q&A and reception.
